title: corylus × colurnoides
intro: Corylus × colurnoides, also known as a hybrid of the Hazel and Filbert, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Corylus × colurnoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
